title: Harness SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Contract for the YAML frontmatter of every SKILL.md. Required: name + description. Optional fields are coverage filled by the frontmatter rollout; check_skill_structure enforces required-present + known-field types (advisory), never penalizes an absent optional field.

name.description: Qualified skill id, e.g. hs:cook or hs-think:brainstorm.

description.description: One-line routing description. Action verb + what + 'Use when/for ...' trigger.

category.description: Functional group from decomposition-map.yaml (e.g. core, flow, think, research).

license.description: SPDX id. ck-port skills = MIT (provenance in STANDARDIZE); native = repo license.

keywords.description: Routing keywords; array of strings or a comma string.

when_to_use.description: Longer trigger guidance beyond the one-line description.

argument-hint.description: CLI-style hint of the skill's arguments, e.g. "<plan-path> [--parallel]".

allowed-tools.description: Tools the skill may use; array or comma string.

user-invocable.description: True if the skill is invocable directly as /<name>.
